type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Less flaring of sour gas in 2019 than there was in 2018. Very small difference but slightly over 10%

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Added another large compressor to site, so increased production resulted in more VOC's from fugitive sources.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Less than the 20 tonne threshold

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The vast majority of Sulfur dioxide comes from flaring. Since flaring is not very consistent and we aren't looking at huge emission tonnages, there is a larger than 10% difference but it is still relatively small at only 3.53894 tonnes. More flaring took place in 2020 than in 2019 so that is why there is more than a 10% difference here.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Less than the 20 tonne threshold.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Very outdated emission factors were used for previous reporting. After consulting with air emissions specialists, the most recent and appropriate emission factors were pointed out to the company (CAPP 2004 - National Inventory of GHG, CAC, and H2S Emissions by the Upstream O&G Industry). Those were applied to this years' report which saw material difference in the majority of emissions reported.
